violations.text: The receptacle in the shared men's/women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025
The door to the shared men's/women's toilet room in the bar area is not self-closing. Self-closing mechanism to be added to the door or hinge. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the grill area of the kitchen do not have continuous coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 08/24/2024
The floor and wall junctures in the kitchen do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

Various dressing/sauces were observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was moved to colder refrigeration. Per PIC, unit will no longer be used to store TCS foods. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023
Various debris was observed on the side of and behind the dumpster. The area around the dumpster must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023
The floor and wall junctures in the kitchen do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/17/2023
